basic_details.organization_name: Tamil Nadu Veterinary and Animal Sciences University (TANUVAS)
basic_details.short_information: Tamil Nadu Veterinary and Animal Sciences University (TANUVAS) Milk Recorder Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the TANUVAS Milk Recorder Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age as on 01-05-2026. No age relaxation details are provided in the extracted data.

qualification.education_qualification: Any Degree, Two wheeler driving license
qualification.details: Milk Recorder: Qualification: Any Degree Gender: Male Age: 21 to 40 years as on 01.05.2026 Must possess a two-wheeler driving license. Candidates with nativity of Anthiyur, Bargur hills, Kadambur hills, and Erode districts are preferred. Experience in animal handling is preferred.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for TANUVAS Milk Recorder recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Milk Recorder post at TANUVAS is scheduled for 18th May 2026. Candidates should ensure they attend on this date with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Milk Recorder post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Milk Recorder position, candidates must possess any degree. Additionally, a two-wheeler driving license is a mandatory requirement for this role.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Milk Recorder position?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Milk Recorder post is between 21 years and 40 years as of 1st May 2026. Candidates falling within this age bracket are eligible to apply.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Milk Recorder post?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Milk Recorder position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 20,000/- per month. This is a contractual role.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the TANUVAS Milk Recorder recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Milk Recorder recruitment at TANUVAS. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q6. Which districts are preferred for the Milk Recorder position?
faq.answer: Candidates with nativity from Anthiyur, Bargur hills, Kadambur hills, and Erode districts are preferred for the Milk Recorder role. This preference may be considered during the selection process.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Milk Recorder role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Milk Recorder position at TANUVAS will involve a written examination followed by an interview. Candidates need to perform well in both stages.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, and a two-wheeler driving license. Self-attested photocopies of these documents are also required.

faq.question: Q9. Is experience in animal handling preferred for the Milk Recorder post?
faq.answer: Yes, experience in animal handling is preferred for the Milk Recorder position. While not mandatory, candidates with relevant experience may have an advantage.

faq.question: Q10. What is the nature of the job for the Milk Recorder post?
faq.answer: The Milk Recorder position at TANUVAS is a contractual job. Selected candidates will be appointed on a contract basis for the duration of the project or as per the university's terms.
